error_message: Direct baseline pre-flight: Qwen/Qwen2-7B-Instruct weights = 10.87 GiB (cached safetensors), available RAM = 1.54 GiB. Naive load would need ~10.87 GiB contiguous, exceeding the 90 % headroom. On Windows the OS kills such allocations at signal level (exit 139) before Python can catch. AirLLM (T-3.1) rescues via per-layer mmap streaming.
